title: Config file contains webhook keys in plaintext
description: config.toml stores webhook keys as plaintext strings under [[webhook]]. If the config file is world-readable (default umask), any local user can read all webhook keys. Mitigation: document that config.toml must be chmod 600 and owned by the broadside service user. Consider supporting environment variable substitution for secrets.
close_reason: Cargo audit: rsa/instant accepted as known risk. Fuzz: ammonia panic fixed, 3 fuzz targets created. Ops: file permission warning at startup, quality gates in CLAUDE.md, signing error sanitized in last_error.
